description: Shot Caller Asset Catalog. Each item carries a dailyRate (USD) so the scene JSON can be parsed by an LLM to estimate per-shot equipment costs.

items.name: ARRI ALEXA Mini LF
items.description: Large-format 4.5K compact cinema camera. Ideal for handheld, gimbal, and tight-space work.
items.notes: Requires LF lens set for full sensor coverage.

items.name: Sony PMW-F5
items.description: 4K S35 cinema camera with global shutter and modular design. Workhorse for documentary and narrative.
items.notes: Pairs with Sony PL or E-mount cinema primes.

categories.label: Lenses
categories.description: Cinema prime and anamorphic lens sets.

items.name: ARRI/Zeiss Ultra Prime Set (6 lenses)
items.description: S35 T1.9 prime set (16mm–135mm). Neutral rendering, rugged build. Industry workhorse.

items.name: Atlas Orion 2x Anamorphic Set (5 lenses)
items.description: 2x squeeze anamorphic primes (32mm–100mm) with oval bokeh and horizontal flares.
items.notes: Requires 2x de-squeeze on monitors and in post.

categories.label: Lighting
categories.description: LED, HMI, and tungsten fixtures. Rates per fixture.

items.name: ARRI SkyPanel S60-C
items.description: Large-format bi-color RGBWW LED soft panel. 1200W equivalent output. The go-to soft source for sets.
items.notes: Requires 20A circuit. Accessories (skirt, snapgrid) rented separately.

items.name: Aputure 600D Pro
items.description: 600W daylight LED COB fixture. High output with Bowens mount for modifier compatibility.
items.notes: Hyper reflector included. Softbox, Fresnel, and barn doors rented separately.

categories.label: Grip & Support
categories.description: Camera support, dollies, cranes, and gimbal rigs.

items.name: Chapman Hybrid II Dolly
items.description: Full-size studio/location dolly. Runs on dance floor, pipe, or curved track. Industry standard.
items.notes: Requires dolly grip operator. Track rented separately at $50/10ft section.

items.name: DJI Ronin 2 Gimbal
items.description: Professional 3-axis motorized gimbal supporting up to 30 lbs. Used for smooth handheld movement.
items.notes: Requires operator familiar with 3-axis gimbal operation.

items.name: Lectrosonics SMQV Wireless Kit (2-ch)
items.description: Two-channel digital hybrid wireless system with SMQV transmitters and SRb receivers.
items.notes: Includes lavalier mics (DPA 4061 or Sanken COS-11).

items.name: DPA 4017B Shotgun Mic
items.description: Professional supercardioid shotgun mic. Transparent sound with high rejection of off-axis noise.
items.notes: Pairs with Rycote Softie windscreen and boom pole.

categories.label: Expendables
categories.description: On-set monitors, consumables, and misc tools.

items.name: SmallHD 1703 17" Monitor
items.description: 17-inch 1000-nit HDR production monitor for director and script supervisor video village.
items.notes: Requires stand and sun shade (rented separately at $50/day).

items.name: Gel & Diffusion Kit
items.description: Assorted CTO/CTB gels, diffusion materials, and blackwrap. Consumable — not returned.
items.notes: Expendable — price is per-use. Include in production budget.

categories.label: Scene Props
categories.description: Hero props and vehicles for scene blocking.

items.name: Pontiac Aztek (Walter's Car)
items.description: Walter White's 2004 Pontiac Aztek. Hero vehicle for the pizza scene driveway blocking.
items.notes: Position in driveway. Walter stands at driver-side window.

items.name: Pizza Box
items.description: Domino's-style pizza box. Hero prop for the pizza roof throw.
items.notes: Place near Walter's mark. Open version used post-throw.

items.name: Pizza (Whole)
items.description: Full pizza for the iconic roof throw. Position on roof for final frame.
items.notes: Place on elevated surface to represent landing position on roof.

items.name: Walter White
items.description: Walter White stand-in for pizza scene blocking. Place at driveway mark.
items.notes: Primary blocking mark. Position at driver-side car window for argument, then driveway center for throw.
